title: Bunny's Modpack
description: This is a modpack created with various mods I found interesting, with slight config and control tweaks to make everything work together
body:
## Bunny's Modpack
This modpack is a collection of various mods I found interesting or liked, with slight control and config tweaks to make everything work together. It aims to add a good amount of content, without being absolutely insane.

This is a decently lightweight pack, which could be enjoyed by everyone, no matter how beefy the computer. It should be able to run on most computers.
